title: Day 5 — Multimodal & Blocks
summary: DALL·E · TTS · tool loop + rich UI with `gr.Blocks`.

sections.heading: Today's goal
sections.remember: Extend tool-calling chat with **images** (DALL·E) and **speech** (TTS) in a custom **Blocks** layout.

sections.heading: DALL·E 3
sections.remember: `openai.images.generate` — ~$0.04/image in lab notes · `response_format="b64_json"` for notebook display.
points: Marketing drafts — always human review before production.

sections.heading: TTS
points: Contrast Week 3: open-source TTS on Colab vs this paid API.

sections.heading: Combined chat pipeline
sections.remember: Tool loop for facts → text reply → optional **city image** + **read-aloud** — latency stacks (LLM + image + audio).

sections.heading: gr.Blocks
points: Week 2 exercise: full technical Q&A with Gradio + streaming + optional tools/audio.
